overall_status: UNITED STATES AUTHORISED VYLEESI CONTEXT EXISTS FOR DEFINED PREMENOPAUSAL HSDD — CATALOGUE POWDER IS NOT AN AUTHORISED-PRODUCT EQUIVALENT

regulatory_records.current_status: Vyleesi bremelanotide injection has an authorised indication for acquired, generalised HSDD in a defined premenopausal female population. The catalogue powder is not the authorised autoinjector.
